title: Night Tide
overview: A young sailor falls in love with a mysterious woman performing as a mermaid on the local pier. As they become entwined, he comes to suspect the woman might be a real mermaid who lures men to a watery death during the full moon.  Preserved by the Academy Film Archive in partnership with The Film Foundation in 2007.
